scenarios.description: Create a structured handoff plan for work that spans product, engineering, security, and operations ownership.
scenarios.example: Prepare a staged migration plan for moving the billing workflow from the legacy scheduler to the event-driven orchestrator.

scenarios.description: Review delivery, compliance, rollback, dependency, and customer-impact risks before a task enters execution.
scenarios.example: Check whether a payment service release has rollback coverage, audit evidence, and owner sign-off before deployment.

scenarios.description: Decide whether collected task evidence satisfies the acceptance criteria for a milestone or deliverable.
scenarios.example: Confirm that migration rehearsal logs, validation screenshots, and monitoring thresholds are sufficient for approval.
